active_slice: OUT-01 Local Output Proof / Video Layer Gap Logger v0

notes: No source media was fetched, opened, downloaded, rendered, or uploaded.
This report classifies local readiness and true gates for the output layer.

proof_readback.reason: The repository has local diagnostic output code paths, but this slice has no tracked source video/source audio/edit pack bundle to prove.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Concrete local source_video/source_audio materials and ledger entries for a target episode.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Use a later approved local-material intake/proof slice with operator-supplied files.
capability_matrix.notes: The current repo state can describe output gaps, but it has no tracked media to prove.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A reviewed transcript for the target episode source audio.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Validate or create transcript.json from local audio/fixture, then review it before acceptance.
capability_matrix.notes: Transcript schema and CLI paths exist; this OUT slice did not ingest media or make a transcript.

capability_matrix.missing_input: An edit_pack connected to the reviewed transcript with selected cuts.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Generate/validate cut candidates and selected_cut_ids after transcript review.
capability_matrix.notes: Editing artifacts are local diagnostics until human acceptance.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Subtitle entries linked to selected cuts and reviewed for timing/text.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Generate subtitle drafts from transcript segments, then run review/proof readbacks.
capability_matrix.notes: Subtitle generation can support local proof; it is not a publication decision.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A concrete thumbnail brief artifact and selected source imagery/material refs.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Promote thumbnail brief seed fields into an operator-reviewable output-layer artifact.
capability_matrix.notes: Planning code references thumbnail intent, but OUT has no current thumbnail proof surface.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A target episode with local media or existing source audio material.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Build a read-only local preview pack once operator-supplied material exists.
capability_matrix.notes: Preview pack is useful readback, but it is not a rendered video proof.

capability_matrix.missing_input: A validated edit_pack with selected cuts and optional transcript refs.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Export CSV/JSON/HTML cut-list readback for human review or NLE handoff.
capability_matrix.notes: NLE export proves edit structure, not final encoded video.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Source video, source audio, edit_pack, selected cut, and optional subtitle source.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Run a narrow diagnostic proof only after local materials are explicitly available.
capability_matrix.notes: The code path exists for local diagnostics; OUT-01 created a no-media proof_missing readback instead.

capability_matrix.missing_input: Rights acceptance, publication judgment, account/OAuth setup, and public target selection.
capability_matrix.next_local_action: Keep public/upload out of local proof work; prepare only decision packets for human review.
capability_matrix.notes: This is a true gate, not a missing local automation task.

gap_log.missing_input: No concrete local source_video/source_audio materials are present for this slice.
gap_log.why_it_matters: Visible video proof cannot be produced or inspected without source media.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local gap; operator-supplied files can unblock a diagnostic proof without public approval.
gap_log.validation: A later proof run records source material ids and leaves git ls-files episodes empty.

gap_log.missing_input: No current portable render/proof manifest is available in tracked docs/artifacts.
gap_log.why_it_matters: Reviewers can see readiness, but not inspect pixels/audio for a concrete episode yet.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local gap; not a rights/publication gate while proof remains diagnostic.
gap_log.validation: Generated proof manifest remains production_ready=false and public_ready=false.

gap_log.missing_input: A reviewable thumbnail brief/output artifact tied to selected source materials.
gap_log.why_it_matters: The output layer cannot compare video proof, title, and thumbnail intent as one package.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local planning gap; final use still depends on human rights/creative acceptance.
gap_log.validation: Brief JSON/HTML names source refs, intended crop/text, and acceptance boundaries.

gap_log.missing_input: A concrete local media target is still needed to run it.
gap_log.why_it_matters: Preview pack can support review, but should not be mistaken for rendered video proof.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local confirmation; no true gate unless public/production claims are added.
gap_log.validation: Preview report remains read-only and contains no public upload behavior.

gap_log.missing_input: An edit_pack with selected cuts for a real target episode.
gap_log.why_it_matters: NLE export proves editorial structure but not final output render quality.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local confirmation; production/public acceptance remains outside the export.
gap_log.validation: CSV/HTML readback points to selected cuts and keeps production flags false.

gap_log.missing_input: Rights decision, publication approval, account/OAuth, and target channel.
gap_log.why_it_matters: A local proof must not drift into public action or claim upload readiness.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: True gate; local automation can only prepare review packets.
gap_log.validation: Upload/public fields stay blocked until human-owned acceptance is recorded.

gap_log.missing_input: A small approved local fixture/material bundle for a diagnostic proof run.
gap_log.why_it_matters: It is the shortest route from readiness inventory to inspectable output evidence.
gap_log.local_vs_true_gate: Local action; it should still avoid source fetching and public publication.
gap_log.validation: Run targeted CLI/tests and attach generated proof readback to docs or artifacts.

recommended_next_slice.goal: Run the smallest approved local-material proof using explicit local source video, source audio, edit_pack, and subtitle inputs.
recommended_next_slice.why_next: It converts the current proof_missing readback into a concrete local render/proof receipt without crossing rights, network, or public gates.
validation: HTML readback embeds or links only local diagnostic outputs.

true_gates.reason: Rights, publication judgment, account/OAuth, and public destination are human-owned decisions.
A later local-material slice can use operator-supplied files without public acceptance.

validation_plan: Confirm every capability row carries the required OUT-01 fields.
Confirm local_output_readback.html has no form, button, or video player.
Run targeted pytest coverage for this generator and asset-fetch boundary smoke.
Run git diff --check and confirm git ls-files episodes is empty.
